# Profesi yg akan tren kedepan adalah AI Harness Engineer. Tugasnya membuat agentic workflow di semua lini organisasi. Kenapa organisasi...

Profesi yg akan tren kedepan adalah AI Harness Engineer. Tugasnya membuat agentic workflow di semua lini organisasi. Kenapa organisasi butuh? Agentic workflow bisa meningkatkan produktivitas berkali-kali lipat. Skill apa yg dibutuhkan? 1. Prompt engineering 2. Context

## Install
```bash
python3 -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate
```

## Usage
```bash
python3 main.py
```

### Expected output
```text
Command completes without runtime errors.
Build status is reported as: SUCCESS.
```

## What this project currently does
- Implement the thinnest useful end-to-end solution in one night build window
- Prefer a runnable CLI or local web app
